name: Woodside Energy Group Ltd
description: Woodside Energy Group Ltd is a leading global energy company headquartered in Australia. The company is primarily engaged in the exploration, evaluation, development, production, and sale of liquefied natural gas (LNG), pipeline gas, crude oil, and condensate. With a diverse portfolio of high-quality assets, Woodside operates across Australia, the Gulf of Mexico, Trinidad and Tobago, Senegal, Timor-Leste, Canada, and Barbados. As a major player in the energy sector, the company focuses on delivering energy solutions while managing a complex international supply chain to meet global demand for reliable and sustainable energy resources.
